svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Outbox 双写" id="dddOutbox"> <mxGraphModel dx="-484" dy="-121" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="920" pageHeight="420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="领域事件事务性 Outbox：事件表与业务表同事务，Relay 每 5 秒补偿投递，事件不丢" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="580" x="170" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TX" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="同一事务（@Transactional）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="280" x="320" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AGG" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="聚合根 publish()
改状态 + 审计字段
events.add(PagePublishedEvent)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DUP" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="DomainEventPublisher.publishAll()
① applicationEventPublisher.publishEvent
 （触发 AFTER_COMMIT，即时 best-effort）
② outboxMapper.insert（事务内落盘）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="320" x="300" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="数据库
domain_outbox 表
processed_at IS NULL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="660" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EA" edge="1" parent="1" source="AGG" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="DUP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ED" edge="1" parent="1" source="DUP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="DB"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RELAY" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="OutboxRelayScheduler（每 5 秒）
扫 processed_at IS NULL（每批 50）
反序列化 → 投递
成功 markProcessed / 失败 attempts+1 指数退避
超 5 次进死信" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="300" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="HANDLER" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="事件监听器（@Async AFTER_COMMIT）
PagePublishSideEffectHandler 等 7 个
缓存失效 / SEO 刷新 / 短链更新
消费端幂等（relay 可能重投）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="660" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ER1" edge="1" parent="1" source="DB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="RELAY"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ER2" edge="1" parent="1" source="RELAY" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="HANDLER"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="事件表与业务表同事务：要么一起成功要么一起回滚，不会出现「业务成了事件没了」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="640" x="140" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 421px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 领域事件事务性 Outbox：事件表与业务表同事务，Relay 每 5 秒补偿投递，事件不丢
